narrative:
Guyan Twp township has 735 registered voters, with 45.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 40.8 percentage points.
